examples: She dropped by to say hello.
Feel free to drop by anytime.
He dropped by on his way home.
They dropped by for a quick visit.
I'll drop by your office later.
example_translate: Я зайду в твой офис позже.
drop by.synonyms: Заходить ненадолго (в гости, на встречу) - stop by, visit briefly, pop in
